title: Image To Image Palmistry Analysis Report Poster AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Palmistry Analysis Report Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image vertical palmistry analysis report poster for user-owned palm photo for visual line annotation, presented as symbolic entertainment visualization. Subject: The uploaded palm photo remains the central hand reference while the report focus palm-line entertainment reading and trait summary is expressed through palm-line overlays, numbered callouts, and structured trait-summary panels. Scene: Eastern metaphysics report poster on rice-paper beige background with ink black, bronze gold, muted dark red, seal marks, bagua motifs, cloud ornaments, and clear mobile-readable information design. Composition: Fixed vertical report layout: top title area, upper label bar, central palm image, thirteen dashed callouts numbered 01 to 13, right-side layered explanations, lower palm-line legend, five-element energy meter, personality keywords, score panel, and bottom destiny-style quote. Signature Elements: Central preserved palm photo, palm-line entertainment reading and trait summary, hand image, numbered callouts, five-element meter, trait tags, non-deterministic advice, thirteen numbered dashed callouts, palm-mount and line regions, five-element meter, seal and bagua ornaments, and non-deterministic entertainment framing. Style: Traditional Chinese palmistry report aesthetic with xuan-paper texture, classical diagram framing, fine dotted leader lines, mystical but polished infographic clarity, and real consultant-report feeling. Color Palette: Rice-paper beige base, ink black linework, antique bronze-gold highlights, dark red seal accents, soft shadowed cards, and readable dark text. Lighting: Soft flat report lighting with subtle paper shadow, gentle gold highlights on callouts, and clear contrast around the uploaded hand image. Materials: Layered paper, xuan-paper fibers, cardstock panels, ink lines, bronze-gold dividers, red seal marks, and clean handcrafted texture. Typography: Chinese entertainment labels appear as short readable labels for features, interpretations, trends or advice, five-element meter, palm-line legend, personality keywords, and the entertainment disclaimer. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image vertical palmistry analysis report poster for left-hand photo supplied by the user with clear palm lines, presented as symbolic entertainment visualization. Signature Elements: Central preserved palm photo, symbolic palm area map and personality keywords, major-line legend, numbered palm regions, short advice cards, entertainment disclaimer, thirteen numbered dashed callouts, palm-mount and line regions, five-element meter, seal and bagua ornaments, and non-deterministic entertainment framing. Style: Traditional Chinese palmistry report aesthetic with xuan-paper texture, classical diagram framing, fine dotted leader lines, mystical but polished infographic clarity, and real consultant-report feeling. Color Palette: Rice-paper beige base, ink black linework, antique bronze-gold highlights, dark red seal accents, soft shadowed cards, and readable dark text. Lighting: Soft flat report lighting with subtle paper shadow, gentle gold highlights on callouts, and clear contrast around the uploaded hand image. Materials: Layered paper, xuan-paper fibers, cardstock panels, ink lines, bronze-gold dividers, red seal marks, and clean handcrafted texture. Typography: Chinese entertainment labels appear as short readable labels for features, interpretations, trends or advice, five-element meter, palm-line legend, personality keywords, and the entertainment disclaimer. Signature Elements: Central preserved palm photo, palm-line entertainment reading and trait summary, hand image, numbered callouts, five-element meter, trait tags, non-deterministic advice, thirteen numbered dashed callouts, palm-mount and line regions, five-element meter, seal and bagua ornaments, and non-deterministic entertainment framing. Style: Traditional Chinese palmistry report aesthetic with xuan-paper texture, classical diagram framing, fine dotted leader lines, mystical but polished infographic clarity, and real consultant-report feeling. Color Palette: Rice-paper beige base, ink black linework, antique bronze-gold highlights, dark red seal accents, soft shadowed cards, and readable dark text. Lighting: Soft flat report lighting with subtle paper shadow, gentle gold highlights on callouts, and clear contrast around the uploaded hand image. Materials: Layered paper, xuan-paper fibers, cardstock panels, ink lines, bronze-gold dividers, red seal marks, and clean handcrafted texture. Typography: Chinese entertainment labels appear as short readable labels for features, interpretations, trends or advice, five-element meter, palm-line legend, personality keywords, and the entertainment disclaimer. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
